headline: Lululemon Names Former Nike Executive as Its CEO. The Stock Is Down.
summary: Lululemon  Athletica has a new CEO, but investors seem skeptical she can fix the athletic wear maker’s old problems.  After the close of trading Wednesday, Lululemon said Heidi O’Neill would be its new chief executive, effective Sept. 8.  O’Neill certainly has a lot of work ahead of her: Lululemon stock is down more than 50% in the past five years, and has lost more than 20% in 2026 alone.

headline: Market reacts coolly as Lululemon taps ex-Nike exec Heidi O’Neill for top job
summary: Investing.com -- Lululemon Athletica (NASDAQ:LULU) shares declined 5% in after-hours trading Wednesday following the company’s announcement that it has appointed Heidi O’Neill as its next Chief Executive Officer.

headline: Lululemon taps former Nike executive to be next CEO
summary: Lululemon (LULU) has named Heidi O'Neill — a former Nike (NKE) executive — as its new CEO, set to take over the chief executive role this September.
